title: Hover transformer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''hover transformer''' was a device used to power [[Hover boots/Legends|hover boots]]. It was approximately the size of a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]], and emitted an energy field that extended for 60 [[Meter/Legends|meters]], capable of powering up to ten pairs of boots.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
